ddls:
CREATE TABLE "plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the plan (e.g., Medigap Plan A) */,
  "plan_type" TEXT /* Type of plan (e.g., Plan A, Plan B, Plan C) */,
  "plan_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the plan */,
  "coverage_area" TEXT /* Geographic area where the plan is applicable */,
  "plan_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the plan becomes effective */,
  "plan_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the plan expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "premiums" (
  "premium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each premium */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plan the premium belongs to */,
  "premium_range" TEXT /* Range of premiums (e.g., $97-$902) */,
  "premium_type" TEXT /* Type of premium (e.g., age-based, health-based) */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age for the premium */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age for the premium */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Health status category for the premium */,
  "enrollment_period" TEXT /* Period during which the premium is applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("premium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_premiums_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "copays" (
  "copay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each copay */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plan the copay belongs to */,
  "copay_amount" REAL /* Amount of copay (e.g., $0) */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service (e.g., approved Part B services) */,
  "copay_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the copay */,
  "limit_per_visit" REAL /* Maximum copay limit per visit */,
  "limit_per_year" REAL /* Maximum copay limit per year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("copay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_copays_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deductibles" (
  "deductible_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deductible */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plan the deductible belongs to */,
  "deductible_amount" REAL /* Amount of deductible (e.g., $1,484) */,
  "deductible_type" TEXT /* Type of deductible (e.g., hospital, medical) */,
  "deductible_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the deductible (e.g., annual, per visit) */,
  "out_of_pocket_max" REAL /* Maximum out-of-pocket expense */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deductible_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deductibles_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plan the benefit belongs to */,
  "benefit_type" TEXT /* Type of benefit (e.g., skilled nursing facility, foreign travel emergency) */,
  "benefit_description" TEXT /* Description of the benefit */,
  "coverage_limit" REAL /* Limit of coverage for the benefit */,
  "waiting_period" INTEGER /* Waiting period before the benefit becomes active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benefits_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the client */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the client */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Health status of the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the client */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the client */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client enrolled in the plan */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plan the client is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the client enrolled in the plan */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, cancelled) */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the enrollment becomes effective */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date when the enrollment is terminated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment the payment belongs to */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the agent */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agent_clients" (
  "agent_client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent-client relationship */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agent_clients_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agent_clients_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, agent, client) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the user accessed the system */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plan_benefits_bridge" (
  "plan_benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plan-benefit relationship */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plan */,
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benefit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_benefits_bridge_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_benefits_bridge_benefit_id FOREIGN KEY ("benefit_id") REFERENCES benefits ("benefit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plan_deductibles_bridge" (
  "plan_deductible_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plan-deductible relationship */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plan */,
  "deductible_id" INTEGER /* ID of the deductible */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_deductible_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_deductibles_bridge_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_deductibles_bridge_deductible_id FOREIGN KEY ("deductible_id") REFERENCES deductibles ("deductible_id")
)
